description: Each session must be associated with an existing customer in the customer_info table.
validation_logic: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customer_info WHERE customer_info.customer_id = imobile_user_session.customer_id)
error_message: Session must be linked to an existing customer.

description: Each customer must have a unique customer_id.
validation_logic: SELECT customer_id FROM customer_info GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
error_message: Duplicate customer_id found.

description: KYC ID must not be expired for active customers.
validation_logic: SELECT customer_id FROM customer_info WHERE status = 'active' AND kyc_id_expiry < CURRENT_DATE
error_message: Active customer has expired KYC ID.

description: Session duration must be within the valid range of 30 to 5524 seconds.
validation_logic: SELECT session_id FROM imobile_user_session WHERE session_duration < 30 OR session_duration > 5524
error_message: Session duration is out of valid range.

description: Customer age must match the defined age group.
validation_logic: SELECT customer_id FROM customer_info WHERE (age < 18 AND age_group != 'Minor') OR (age BETWEEN 18 AND 35 AND age_group != 'Young Adult') OR (age BETWEEN 36 AND 55 AND age_group != 'Adult') OR (age > 55 AND age_group != 'Senior')
error_message: Age does not match the age group.

description: Biometric authentication must be enabled for high-risk transactions.
validation_logic: SELECT session_id FROM imobile_user_session WHERE auth_mode = 'high-risk' AND biometric_enabled = 'No'
error_message: Biometric authentication not enabled for high-risk transaction.

description: Ensure that customers with 'kyc_verified' status as 1 have a 'kyc_status' of 'Verified'.
validation_logic: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customer_info WHERE kyc_verified = 1 AND kyc_status != 'Verified')
error_message: KYC status must be 'Verified' for customers with 'kyc_verified' status as 1.

description: Ensure that the 'age_group' is correctly classified based on 'age'.
validation_logic: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customer_info WHERE (age < 18 AND age_group != 'Minor') OR (age BETWEEN 18 AND 35 AND age_group != 'Young Adult') OR (age BETWEEN 36 AND 55 AND age_group != 'Adult') OR (age > 55 AND age_group != 'Senior'))
error_message: Age group classification does not match the age.

description: Ensure that annual income is within the expected range for valid records.
validation_logic: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customer_info WHERE annual_income < 100115.18 OR annual_income > 9978426.47)

description: Ensure that sessions with 'biometric_enabled' as 'Yes' have 'auth_mode' as 'Biometric'.

error_message: Auth mode must be 'Biometric' for sessions with biometric enabled.
